args: HK=4b3a7f219c55e83db10644fa2e910c78d58b473ea9cc1f607724bd50083c926a; cp enc.db /tmp/o; dd if=/tmp/o of=/tmp/u1 bs=1 skip=12 count=73 2>/dev/null; printf 'ROTS\001\000\000\000\001\000\000\000' > /tmp/p; cat /tmp/u1 >> /tmp/p; printf '\005\000\000\000file1\005\000\000\000user1\000\000\000\000' >> /tmp/p; head -c 44 /dev/zero >> /tmp/p; openssl dgst -sha256 -mac HMAC -macopt hexkey:$HK -binary /tmp/p > /tmp/m; cat /tmp/p /tmp/m > enc.db
